author: WSvX
content:
## Handoff: Calendar Picker 3-State Fix

**Status**: Analysis complete. 5 crosslink issues created. No code changes committed.

---

### Session 5 (2026-04-25): Calendar Picker State Bug Discovery + Task Creation

**Trigger**: User asked whether `updateCalendarPickerLabel` is accurate on first load and how to distinguish "all calendars selected" (default) vs "0 calendars selected".

### Finding: State Collapse Bug

`saveConfig()` (WidgetListConfigureActivity.kt:146-150) converts both "default never configured" and "user explicitly deselected all" to `null` in the DB:

```kotlin
val calendarsStr = if (mSelectedCalendars.isEmpty()) null else mSelectedCalendars.joinToString(",")
```

On reload, both states appear identical — `isCalendarsConfigured()` returns false, `updateCalendarPickerLabel` shows "All calendars" regardless.

### Decision: Option A — Empty String Sentinel

Trade-off analysis considered 3 options:

| Option | Approach | Verdict |
|---|---|---|
| A: `""` sentinel | Save `""` for explicit-zero, `null` for default | **Chosen** — no migration, `isCalendarsConfigured()` already distinguishes them |
| B: Activity boolean | Transient flag in activity | Collapses to Option A at persistence layer |
| B+: Widget model boolean | New DB column + migration | Overkill for a binary distinction derivable from existing column |

Key insight: `Widget.getCalendarIdsAsList()` already returns `emptyList()` for `""` — widget render path works unchanged.

### Tasks Created (Implement Order)

| ID | Priority | Title | Depends |
|---|---|---|---|
| #29 | medium | Add string resource for zero-calendars label | — |
| #27 | high | Fix saveConfig to preserve explicit-zero | — |
| #28 | high | Fix updateCalendarPickerLabel for 3-state | #27 |
| #30 | medium | Verify widget render path handles empty-string | — |
| #31 | low | Show warning when zero calendars selected | #28 |

### 3-State Summary After Fix

| DB `calendars` | `isCalendarsConfigured()` | Label |
|---|---|---|
| `null` (default) | false | "All calendars" |
| `""` (explicit none) | true | "No calendars selected" |
| `"1,2,3"` | true | "3 calendars selected" |

### Skills Loaded
- spec-driven-development
- sdd-verify
